MemberSignature.Value: public bool? ShouldAssignPermissions { get; set; }
.property instance valuetype System.Nullable`1<bool> ShouldAssignPermissions
Public Property ShouldAssignPermissions As Nullable(Of Boolean)
member this.ShouldAssignPermissions : Nullable<bool> with get, set

Docs.summary: Set to true to have Azure portal create role assignments on the resource ID or resource scope value of this parameter during policy assignment. This property is useful in case you wish to assign permissions outside the assignment scope.

MemberSignature.Value: public string StrongType { get; set; }
.property instance string StrongType
Public Property StrongType As String
member this.StrongType : string with get, set

Docs.summary: Used when assigning the policy definition through the portal. Provides a context aware list of values for the user to choose from.
